coreIssue: This senior Engineering Manager 1:1 is likely about whether Elena’s post-reorg withdrawal reflects temporary transition load or a mismatch in scope, priorities, and support.
openingQuestion: How has the reorg changed what you’re spending energy on, and where does that leave you in team and leadership conversations right now?
listenFor: whether she names a specific forum or team interaction she has stepped back from since the reorg
whether she describes last sprint or this quarter in terms of protecting delivery at the expense of broader leadership presence
if they pause, generalize, or redirect when you ask what support from you would make the biggest difference now
avoid: do not treat reduced visibility in leadership forums as proof that she is disengaged or struggling
do not jump into fixing workload or role scope before she has described what she is intentionally prioritizing
goodOutcome: You and Elena have agreed what senior Engineering Manager presence is still expected in this reorg phase and one concrete support adjustment from you that protects that scope.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one specific leadership forum example and one team interaction example you have noticed so you can ground the conversation in observations, not interpretation.
